feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: all that was good
entry.summary:
Author: carrionwoes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,727Chapters: 4/30Kudos: 144

Summary: “She looks great, doesn’t she?” Gwen said, seemingly coming out of smoke and shadow. Merlin agreed wordlessly with a nod. “Some people are just born to be queen,” Gwen continued. “No?” Merlin tried to not sound too grossed out, poor Morgana. Contrary to Merlin, Gwen was actually doing her job, filling up goblets, and handing them out to various nobles. “I hope so. One day.” Though it does not seem to stir her away from partaking in healthy gossip. “Well, I would hate to be her,” Merlin exclaimed. “Who'd want to marry Arthur?” Gwen snorted at that.Or, Merlin is born a girl. Some things change, while others stay the same.

Author: evasmlp

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,562Chapters: 20/22Kudos: 882

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: Dragon's Fulfilment
entry.summary:
Author: Amacerise

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,032Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 56

Summary: Arthur, his Knights, and Merlin return from their quest to kill a hippogriff. But not without new secrets to whisper, new treasures to cherish, and a whole court to beguile into believing that Arthur and his manservant aren't married in everything but name. It's one year until Merlin gives birth to his clutch of dragonlings. What tribulations will follow in the meantime? Rating may go up, tags may change. This is primarily an exercise in discovery writing so bear with me for major pauses; hopefully it's not a mess.

entry.title: Destiny Unfold
entry.summary:
Author: chronic_pain_in_the_ass

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 145,189Chapters: 13/65Kudos: 152

Summary: No young man, no matter how great, or mystic can know his destiny. He cannot glimpse his part in the great story that is about to unfold. Like everyone, he must live and learn. And so, it will be for the young magic arriving at the gates of Camelot. A boy that will, in time, father the legend. His name: Merlin.OrA rewrite of Merlin if the writers weren’t cowards. A lot gayer, magic users aren’t the enemy in every single episode, and Uther is the actual villain of the story. Morgana is still a villain, but we have sympathy for her.

entry.title: the sunlight trapped inside the wood (through the squall the course stays true)
entry.summary:
Author: aletterinthenameofsanity

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,149Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: “You will make an excellent queen, you do know that, right?” Arthur asks, and there is something tender in his eyes. Something in her wants to protest. She was the one to introduce the rust. She was the one who mixed in too much iron and upset the delicate balance of nature and magic and steel. But there is also something in her that thinks— A spine of steel cannot be too bad a thing.  If Merlin is sunshine, if Gwen is the fire of the forge, if Arthur is the steel between them— There is something here, brighter than gold, stronger than steel, more enduring than iron. Something that will not rust. They have to do what they can to make sure that they can actually get to that sunlight. To get rid of the sorrow staining Merlin’s shoulder, the poison that is spilling through his veins, a sludge that will destroy him. Gwen needs to be able to see Merlin’s smile again. And Arthur needs that as well. (When Gwen uses iron to arrest the Lamia's magical poison to save Merlin's life, she quickly realizes that it does more harm than good. When she arrives back in Camelot, Gaius gives her and Arthur one solution to save Merlin's life: True Love's Kiss.)

entry.title: No Sick Days for Manservants
entry.summary:
Author: inconsistentracoon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,239Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 222

Summary: Merlin learned early on in his career as Arthur's manservant and destined protector that sick days were not a part of his contract.After spending the week taking care of Arthur, Merlin has finally caught the prince's flu, and all he wants is a break. But with the spring tournament about to begin, and the discovery of a murder plot, Merlin doubts he'll get one anytime soon.orMerlin gets sick and makes it worse by working through it and getting injured.

entry.summary:
Author: loser_boy08

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 636Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

entry.summary:

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,523Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 51

Summary: "Was there... was there truly a need for you to kiss me, Merlin?""You were drowning, Arthur. Believe me, kissing a stubborn, ungrateful royal idiot was not on my itinerary today." One is an Ezaki, a prince searching for the Lake of Avalon to tear down the walls between their worlds. The other is a sorcerer, risking everything to seal the sword forever within its hidden waters. Beginning in Constantinople, the heart of the Eastern Roman Empire, and stretching deep into the Sassanid Empire to the ancient city of Gundeshapur—this is a journey set in 540 AD, where real historical events interweave with a high-stakes "Enemies to Lovers" romance. ✾ Long ago, as humans and Ezakis faced mutual destruction, their kings knelt before the sacred sword in the Lake of Avalon. A history written in blood was sealed with peace, and the Khazar Era began. Until Uther Pendragon rose to power and turned that peace to ash. Desperate, humanity turned back to Avalon. The lake's magic raised a colossal, insurmountable wall between the two realms. The magic was never to be broken; the gate, never opened. Yet, on the day the world tore in two, a power was born to change everything—Merlin.

entry.title: Secrets
entry.summary:
Author: sword_and_shield_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,251Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Arthur is the Detective Chief Inspector of the CaPD (Camelot Police Department). Merlin works there as a forensic scientist. Although they're attracted to each other, their relationship is nothing more than physical relief and, most importantly for Arthur, secret.Together they solve cases involving magic, even though Merlin hasn't shared his most important secret with Arthur yet. For good reason. After all, sorcerers are despised in the eyes of the Pendragons. Will they eventually acknowledge their feelings for each other and admit them? Until then, they have a bumpy, painful, and eye-opening road ahead.

entry.title: You should Never have let me Believe
entry.summary:
Author: Heyup_bro

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,602Chapters: 2/22Kudos: 17

Summary: PLEASE READ THE TAGS!! I will make sure to put warnings on each chapter so you can try skip the violence but please still beware. ✧*̣̩⋆̩☽⋆༉‧₊˚✧ When the round table crew get captured by a vengeful noble while on a hunt, things quickly turn sour with their captors and Merlin is forced to choose between revealing his magic and saving them all. Obviously, that is an incredibly easy dilemma. All that’s left is to try clean up the mess he ends up creating and get them out, while convincing those fearful of magic that he means no harm. Easy, right? ✧*̣̩⋆̩☽⋆༉‧₊˚✧ This is my first fic so I hope you guys like it!!I may add tags as it goes on so please keep an eye on them Based off of Tansyuduri’s fic ‘Return To Me’

entry.title: A FAKE DESTINY REVERSAL
entry.summary:
Author: OfTintagel

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,327Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 20

Summary: When Morgana gets deceived to think Mordred is Emrys and Merlin is Arthur’s Bane, it gives Merlin opportunities he could only dream of. Or, Merlin pretends to be on Morgana’s side, pratically becomes a spy and they plot against poor Mordred together.

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,673Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 82

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Through All of Time
entry.summary:
Author: Sorreli

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,780Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 33

Summary: “I believe it,” Arthur sighs, “I won’t ever get a break, will I? How is it I’ve managed to become the sole entertainment for two sorcerers? I mean, really.”  Merlin chuckles, “I think his magic just… recognizes you.”  Merlin can hear Arthur's breath stutter behind him. “Oh, that’s…”  “I know,” he agrees, turning in Arthur’s arms so he can finally see his face. In the moonlight Arthur appears quite taken, the sudden pull of emotion heavy in the blue of his eyes as he stares back at Merlin unblinking. “I keep thinking about what my mother said. How she thinks his magic is just acting out because he doesn’t know what it’s like to be afraid of showing it. How he feels safe. With you.”  Arthur’s jaw tightens and finally he does look away, something glistening in his eyes as he loosens his hold on Merlin’s waist.  “With you too,” he mumbles, blinking just a little too quickly, “...maybe we are doing something right.”    -   A series of one shots that take place in the rise of Albion where Merlin and Arthur raise a child together through the years.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: 500 Miles From My Home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_p3ndragon

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,514Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 240

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word traitor. A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

entry.title: I'm an idiot
entry.summary:
Author: Chunky_monkey11

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,896Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 27

Summary: Arthur will only ever see Merlin as his stupid little servant and nothing more. That is what Merlin thinks anyways. If Arthur thinks that then maybe he should just accept the fact that its true. He is just an idiot. Nothing more.
